lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Check unique active ownership, bounded work, legal transitions, terminal immutability, count reconciliation, and recoverability. Artifact under review: deterministic frontier transition model.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, fetch one convenient page, omit owner authorization, source and emitted revision, URL and robots policy, runtime admission, stream and Promise ownership, Cheerio and browser differences, accessibility states, changed fixtures, recovery, and controlled Node transfer, then accept plausible objects as TypeScript crawler proof. This does not satisfy State Invariants for deterministic frontier transition model.
The record names the assumption, applies State Invariants, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The State Invariants record says deterministic frontier transition model looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for State Invariants.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Check unique active ownership, bounded work, legal transitions, terminal immutability, count reconciliation, and recoverability.
